docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF NECFCU IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LILLY LO MANAGER. DEFENDANT GODON WONG IS PRESENT. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS BREACHED, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A NEW ACTION. THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED SEP-04-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, GORDON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,211.14 FILED BY NECFCU AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, GORDON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NECFCU
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
